expanded_queries: What signals a strong displacement move?

final_chunks.section_title: THE ELEPHANT IN THE SWIMMING POOL
final_chunks.text:
THE ELEPHANT IN THE SWIMMING POOL
Displacement is crucial. When price goes above an old high and then trades down below it, you need to see an 'obvious displacement'.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
Market structure shifts occur on all timeframes. For intraday trading: The high that forms after the run on liquidity is the 'displacement high. ' The low that breaks the prior short-term low is the 'displacement low.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
After a swing high is taken out and an energetic break below it occurs: Look for a clear Fair Value Gap (FVG) formed by a smashing down movement. The low, the high, and if price trades back up into that FVG, you look for a short entry.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT IN MARKET PRICE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT IN MARKET PRICE
You are looking for which side of the marketplace has most recently shown a displacement. Has price moved away from price levels aggressively? Was there speed involved?
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
When observing price, look for decisive displacement, not just a drift. Price indicates it is reaching for something, specifically the liquidity resting below old lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Institutional Price Action： Micro-Market Structure & Time & Price Concepts Part 02_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SIGNIFICANT MOVES AFTER STOP RAIDS
final_chunks.text:
SIGNIFICANT MOVES AFTER STOP RAIDS
Chasing price will deplete your account very quickly. Significant price moves are typically seen immediately after stops are rated.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex Scout Sniper Basic Field Guide - Vol. 8_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MORNING BIAS AND INITIAL LIQUIDITY OBJECTIVES
final_chunks.text:
MORNING BIAS AND INITIAL LIQUIDITY OBJECTIVES
A prior video discussed being in a recent trading range. If the market moved higher with displacement, it could have been a draw on liquidity. The objective was near-term upside if a break higher occurred.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 39_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NEWS DRIVEN LIQUIDITY GRAB AND SMART MONEY SALES
final_chunks.text:
NEWS DRIVEN LIQUIDITY GRAB AND SMART MONEY SALES
This return into the order block sets the stage for another move lower. We see a swing high form, with lower highs to the right and left, indicating a potential for displacement and lower movement.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 17_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET RALLY, DISPLACEMENT, IMPULSE SWING, AND RETRACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
MARKET RALLY, DISPLACEMENT, IMPULSE SWING, AND RETRACEMENT
The market has to rally first in order to have displacement. The market creates an Impulse price swing. When that impulse price swing occurs, we wait for the retracement.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET INTERACTION WITH LIQUIDITY ZONES
final_chunks.text:
MARKET INTERACTION WITH LIQUIDITY ZONES
The market first trades down into the sell-side liquidity, running through it. Then, it rallies back up, clearing the equal highs where buy stops have been taken. At both of these price points, where liquidity is swept, we anticipate a market structure shift.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 3_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISPLACEMENT LEG AND LOWER TIMEFRAME PREMIUM
final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT LEG AND LOWER TIMEFRAME PREMIUM
If you look at this displacement leg, you might measure it and say it didn't go to a premium. I don't expect it to go to a premium here because the market is in a hurry to get down below the 3855 level for the week.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 33_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET ACTION ANALYSIS (15-MINUTE CHART): LACK OF DISPLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
MARKET ACTION ANALYSIS (15-MINUTE CHART): LACK OF DISPLACEMENT
So with that area shaded right here, this is a 15-minute chart. You can see we traded down into it. The candle stopped right at the old candle high, and the next candle just gave up the ghost right away.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 24_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY VOIDS AND FAIR VALUE
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY VOIDS AND FAIR VALUE
The orange shaded area shows a quick, sudden movement away from a price level (an aggressive drop).
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 1 - Elements Of A Trade Setup_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY RUN FROM BREAKER TO IMBALANCE
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY RUN FROM BREAKER TO IMBALANCE
The perceived support at relative equal lows accumulates sell-side liquidity. The market runs from the breaker down into this liquidity, hitting it and trading into an imbalance (which is A nice retracement into this FVG occurs, followed by a sharp delivery.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Review Precision Results_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY AND NARRATIVE
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY AND NARRATIVE
Smart money traders do not look for patterns like bull flags or wedge patterns. Instead, they focus on: Liquidity: What is the underlying market narrative (bullish/bearish). Daily Range: Will it go higher or lower.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMART MONEY TACTICS AND BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY VOID
final_chunks.text:
SMART MONEY TACTICS AND BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY VOID
Smart money, due to their large order sizes, must scale in their positions gradually. They cannot facilitate their entire net short position at a single price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Liquidity Voids_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LESSER TIMEFRAME TARGETS AFTER LIQUIDITY POOL RAID
final_chunks.text:
LESSER TIMEFRAME TARGETS AFTER LIQUIDITY POOL RAID
That was framed as we see on our Market Maker Manipulation template. The discount Market PD array is going to be used on a time frame lesser than the premium liquidity pool that was used.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Blending IPDA Data Ranges & PD Arrays_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LONDON SESSION RAIDS (ETH) AND SETUP EXECUTION
final_chunks.text:
LONDON SESSION RAIDS (ETH) AND SETUP EXECUTION
When analyzing a full 24-hour rotation, if price is not in close proximity to the previous PM session range at Time Window: The range between 2:00 AM and 5:00 AM New York local time.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - One Trading Setup For Life_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PURPOSE OF LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND THE 'REAL MOVE' TARGET
final_chunks.text:
PURPOSE OF LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND THE 'REAL MOVE' TARGET
The market takes out these long holders because they are not meant to profit from the 'real move. ' The real move was hinted at 12553. 25, which was the true draw on liquidity.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 30_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NEW WEEK OPENING GAP AND LONDON SESSION LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
NEW WEEK OPENING GAP AND LONDON SESSION LIQUIDITY
The attention last Friday was called to this specific level. Following the weekend, the market opened and created the new week opening gap. Subsequently, the market rallied through this gap to specific levels.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Opening Range Gap Repricing Macro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PRICE ACTION AFTER BUY-SIDE ACCUMULATION
final_chunks.text:
PRICE ACTION AFTER BUY-SIDE ACCUMULATION
Price will seek a lower short-term discount array to offset positions. Reaccumulate fair value and retracements higher at premium arrays. Weak short holders will be squeezed in the retracement higher.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 09 - Bread & Butter Sell Setups_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: UNDERSTANDING LIQUIDITY VOIDS AND BALANCED PRICE RANGES
final_chunks.text:
UNDERSTANDING LIQUIDITY VOIDS AND BALANCED PRICE RANGES
A 'liquidity void' is an actual gap between a candle's high and another candle's low. Observe how the market moved above a short-term high, specifically targeting and taking liquidity from that liquidity void.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 Ep 01_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING SELL STOPS AND LIQUIDITY RAIDS
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING SELL STOPS AND LIQUIDITY RAIDS
Consider a chart with equal lows. While retail-minded traders perceive these as support for a buy, institutional traders recognize them as a liquidity pool containing sell stops. The market often moves to attack these sell stops.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - What New Traders Should Focus On_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: INEFFICIENCY OR LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
INEFFICIENCY OR LIQUIDITY
When trading with these concepts, you are essentially seeking to understand what the algorithm is likely to Why should it move higher. For an inefficiency, or to take out buy stops. Why should it move lower. To trade to an inefficiency, or to take out sell stops.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Market Review May 17, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ALGORITHMIC THEORY
final_chunks.text:
ALGORITHMIC THEORY
From personal experience, it has been discovered that the fastest markets are those that decline. The market goes down rapidly not because sellers are relentlessly pushing it, but because the market is rushing to exit participants before they can get out at their own price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 7 - Trade Plan & Algorithmic Theory_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: INSTITUTIONAL ORDER FLOW & RETAIL LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
INSTITUTIONAL ORDER FLOW & RETAIL LIQUIDITY
Following the wick engagement, an 'institutional overflow entry drill' occurred into buy-side inefficiency. Price then rallied, initially falling short of higher highs. Any subsequent retracement would setup a further run to take out buy-side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Market Review & When Wrong Is Still ＂Right＂_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FOMC MANIPULATION AND ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SWEEP
final_chunks.text:
FOMC MANIPULATION AND ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SWEEP
The market goes into a dive in New York, then rallies up and closes the day. On FOMC day at 2:00 p. m. in the afternoon, the market trades down, taking out a short-term low, and then rallies.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 5 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: INITIAL MARKET REACTION AND LIQUIDITY OBSERVATION
final_chunks.text:
INITIAL MARKET REACTION AND LIQUIDITY OBSERVATION
Volatility is expected. Initially, the sell side was attacked. ICT notes that a specific high wasn't taken out, and this high is associated with the consequent The current market state is not 'tradeable'; it is purely for observation.
final_chunks.source: ICT February 2023 FOMC_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NEUTRALIZING LONG LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
NEUTRALIZING LONG LIQUIDITY
Another form of manipulation in bullish conditions is neutralizing long liquidity. This means individuals who are already long or recently bought near the opening price have their positions upset by the drop below the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ENGINEERING LONG LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LONG LIQUIDITY
When bearish, we anticipate manipulation. The form of manipulation we expect to see is engineering long liquidity. This involves a quick, sudden movement higher to entice breakout artists who want to buy. They will be placed on the wrong side of the marketplace.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY DRIVEN MOVEMENT
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY DRIVEN MOVEMENT
The entire setup and observed price action is fundamentally based on the liquidity resting below the previous day's low. It is crucial to understand that the Fibonacci tool itself is not the 'magic' or the reason why price is moving to these levels.
final_chunks.source: OTE Pattern Recognition Series - Vol. 05_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: COMMERCIAL POSITIONING AND LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
COMMERCIAL POSITIONING AND LIQUIDITY
Commercials pair orders above an old high where there's a high pool of liquid participants willing to buy. Buy stops are triggered for short holders, and breakout artists buy the breakout.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model #4 Supplementary Lesson_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET LIQUIDITY AND SMART MONEY DYNAMICS
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Defining HTF PD Arrays_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY AND INEFFICIENCY
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY AND INEFFICIENCY
To take out buy stops (above old highs) or sell stops (below old lows). To trade into some form of inefficiency (a Fair Value Gap). This is not due to 'buying pressure' or 'selling pressure.
final_chunks.source: Thursday June 15, 2023 ⧹ ICT Price Action Workshop_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY HUNT
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY HUNT
The objective was to see a specific low taken out. This area held 'buy-side' liquidity, which are buy stops typically targeted by breakout traders using trend lines. The strategy involved taking the buy-side first, then running the 'sell-side relative equal lows'.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Review Of The Interactive Study 090123 NFP NQ Short_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND OFFSET DISTRIBUTION
final_chunks.text:
BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND OFFSET DISTRIBUTION
The buy side was outlined across various highs. A previous tweet noted a lack of runs on liquidity, indicating that liquidity is being stacked up.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Market Review May 17, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: REFINING DISCOUNT ARRAY AND LIQUIDITY POOLS
final_chunks.text:
REFINING DISCOUNT ARRAY AND LIQUIDITY POOLS
Refining the discount array initially identified on the five-minute chart to the one-minute imbalance. This refined imbalance still resides below the current low, indicating sell-side liquidity and inefficiency there.
final_chunks.source: March 30, 2023 Live Tape Reading - AM Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PRICE DELIVERY TO INEFFICIENCIES AND LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
PRICE DELIVERY TO INEFFICIENCIES AND LIQUIDITY
Price tends to rally into premium inefficiencies, such as a Buy Side Imbalance Sell Side Inefficiency (BISIE), especially during events like NFP.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY VOID AND POTENTIAL RE-ENTRY STRATEGY
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY VOID AND POTENTIAL RE-ENTRY STRATEGY
A small gap exists, representing a real liquidity void. Price is expected to eventually return to fill this gap. There is an intention to buy more if price trades back into this liquidity void.
final_chunks.source: 5 Handle Twitter Example Live Execution... January 30, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DRAW ON LIQUIDITY AND REDUNDANCY OF EXTERNAL TOOLS
final_chunks.text:
DRAW ON LIQUIDITY AND REDUNDANCY OF EXTERNAL TOOLS
Draw on liquidity is the sole purpose of price delivery.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - One Trading Setup For Life_Handbook.blocks.json
